name: Imperial Settlers: Imperial Miners
short_description: Card placing and engine building game in the world of Imperial Settlers. Digital version of board game hit from Portal Games.
detailed_description:
Card placing and engine building game in the world of Imperial Settlers.

Imperial Settlers: Imperial Miners is the official digital version of board game hit from Portal Games.

  • In Imperial Miners you have 10 rounds to build your Mine as efficiently as possible. Your goal is to collect as many Crystals and full Carts as possible, which will count as Victory Points at the end of the game.

  • You have 4 levels of mine and one card to place in each round.

  • After placing card in your Mine you activate its effect and then effects of adjacent card on above level until your reach the Mine surface.

  • Than you activate the action from the Surface board.

  • Some of the actions gives you a chance to advance on the Progress boards where you can activate additional actions.

  • In each round you have unique Event to resolve, some of them are good some are bad, so be prepared for the unknown.
